selected_games.label: Resource exchange
selected_games.reason: Primary mixed-motive dyadic negotiation game named in the setting goals.

upstream_mapping.note: The repository README says paper experiments are in the paper_experiment_code branch. In that branch, the aggregate resource-exchange scenario is implemented as games/trading_game and runner/trading_main.py.

selected_games.label: Buy/sell
selected_games.reason: Second setup target named in the setting goals; useful for price anchoring and payoff asymmetry.

upstream_mapping.note: The paper branch exposes buy/sell as games/buy_sell_game and runner/buysell_main.py.

skipped_games.reason: Explicitly skipped for the first B5 setup pass in goals.md.

notes: Use the upstream paper_experiment_code branch, because the main README says the paper experiments live there and marks Resource Exchange incomplete on main.
Upstream class/function names should be filled after scripts/bringup_check.py confirms local checkout metadata.
